title: City Places Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A place in town where we buy food and things.
rounds.explanation: shop: A place in town where we buy food and things.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The person who sells you things inside a shop.
rounds.explanation: shopkeeper: The person who sells you things inside a shop.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To start moving, like when the light turns green.
rounds.explanation: go: To start moving, like when the light turns green.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A busy place with many stalls selling fruit and vegetables.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Someone you like to play with and help every day.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The colour of grass, and of the light meaning go.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: We buy bread at the corner shop.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: We play football in the park.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The shopkeeper gives Sami his change.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Who teaches the children at school?
rounds.explanation: A teacher works at school; a nurse works at a hospital, a shopkeeper at a shop and a pilot flies a plane.

rounds.prompt: The traffic light turns red. What must you do?
rounds.explanation: Red means stop and wait; green is the light that means go.

rounds.prompt: The park is right beside the school. Which sentence says this?
choices: The park is inside the school.
The school is in the park.
The park is next to the school.
The park is under the school.
rounds.answer: The park is next to the school.
rounds.explanation: Next to means beside; under, inside and in tell us something different.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What does the red traffic light mean in the story?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Stop

rounds.prompt: Who works at the hospital in Amal's town?
choices: He said sorry and put it in the bin
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: The doctor, Faduma

rounds.prompt: Which quiet place did Amal and Mum visit last of all?
choices: He said sorry and put it in the bin
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: The library

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 - Listen and point
rounds.target: Point to town places as an adult names them, then name them on your own.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3 - Ask and answer
rounds.target: and answer about the people who help your town.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5 - Role-play
rounds.target: Role-play a trip around your town.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The park is near our house.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The shop near us is small.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'neighbour' mean in this unit?
choices: A person who lives in the house next to yours.
A place in town where we buy food and things.
The place where children come to learn and play together.
rounds.answer: A person who lives in the house next to yours.
rounds.explanation: neighbour: A person who lives in the house next to yours.

rounds.prompt: What does 'yellow' mean in this unit?
choices: A place in town where we buy food and things.
The place where children come to learn and play together.
The bright colour of lemons and the middle traffic light.
rounds.answer: The bright colour of lemons and the middle traffic light.
rounds.explanation: yellow: The bright colour of lemons and the middle traffic light.

rounds.prompt: What does 'school' mean in this unit?
choices: A green place in town with grass, trees and swings.
The place where children come to learn and play together.
A place in town where we buy food and things.
rounds.answer: The place where children come to learn and play together.
rounds.explanation: school: The place where children come to learn and play together.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'next to'?
rounds.explanation: next to is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'quiet'?
rounds.explanation: quiet is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'teacher'?
rounds.explanation: teacher is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: The place where children come to learn and play together.
A long hard path where cars and buses drive.
A person who helps you get better when you are ill.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A person who lives in the house next to yours.
Close to something, only a short walk away.
To end moving and stand still, like at a red light.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: The colour of grass, and of the light meaning go.
Little in size, like a bird or a coin.
Free from dirt and dust, fresh and tidy.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: Where do you go to buy bread and milk?
rounds.explanation: We buy food at the shop; you cannot buy bread at a hospital, a park or a library.

rounds.prompt: Where do you wait to get on a bus?
rounds.explanation: Buses pick people up at the bus stop; the other places are not for waiting for a bus.

rounds.prompt: Who looks after you when you are ill in hospital?
rounds.explanation: A doctor helps ill people; a farmer grows food, a driver drives and a baker makes bread.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word names a place in a town?
rounds.explanation: A market is a place you can go to; a pencil is a thing, a goat is an animal and wet describes something.

rounds.prompt: Where do you go if you are very ill and need a doctor?
rounds.explanation: Doctors and nurses work at the hospital; we go to the park to play, the shop to buy and the school to learn.

rounds.prompt: Where do you go to borrow a book?
rounds.explanation: The library is where books are kept and borrowed; the market is for shopping, the park for playing and the bus stop for waiting.
